ui.title: Tree Scaffolder
ui.plan_summary: Plan computed: {dirs} new folders, {files} new files, {overwrites} overwrites.
ui.recovery_desc: Select a recovery log to restore the source code and target path.

log.clearing_data: Clearing all editor content and planned data...
log.similar_warning: [⚠️ WARNING] Potential Name Conflicts / Typos Detected:
log.similar_desc: Planned files have very similar names to existing files. Please check for typos.
log.identical_info: [INFO] Redundant File Definition (Identical): The following files already match the Source Code definition:
log.identical_desc: Files with identical content already exist. They will remain unchanged.
log.make_tree_attempt: Attempting to generate tree from source...
log.make_tree_success: Successfully generated tree from {count} file paths.

summary.empty_overwrite_warn: ⚠️ WARNING: Existing file content will be deleted and replaced with an empty file.

message.select_root_first: Please select a valid root folder first.
message.root_not_found: Root Folder Unavailable: The selected folder has been deleted or is inaccessible. All path settings will be reset.
message.empty_editors: Both editors are empty. Nothing to compute.
message.job_name_empty: Job name is empty. Continue with a default name?
message.compute_first_job: You must compute a valid plan first before naming the job.
message.conflicts_msg:
Structural conflicts found. (e.g., folder exists where a file is planned)
Apply is disabled.
message.conflicts_msg_detail: Path Conflict: Attempted to create '{path}' as a {type}, but a {existing} already exists on disk.
message.confirm_cleanup_msg:
This will delete all but the last {n} log sessions.
Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
message.cleanup_success: Successfully deleted {count} old log session folders.
message.no_old_sessions: No old session folders found to delete.
message.no_v2_blocks: No valid V2 blocks found in the Source Code editor.
message.err_tab_mix: TabError at line {line}: Mixed tabs and spaces in indentation.
message.err_indent_type: TabError at line {line}: Indentation type changed from parent line.
message.err_indent_unit: IndentationError at line {line}: Inconsistent indentation. Expected multiple of {unit} spaces.
message.err_invalid_char: Error at line {line}: Invalid characters in filename ('{name}').
message.err_root_first: Error: First node must be '@ROOT' name '{name}/'.
message.err_deep_indent: Structure error at line {line}: Node '{name}' is indented too deeply.
message.err_duplicate_v2: Duplicate file definition FOUND INSIDE 'Source Code' editor: '{path}'

sys.recovery_file_missing: Selected log file no longer exists.
sys.recovery_notify_msg:
Target files have been updated, and original contents were backed up for safety.
You can restore them anytime using the generated recovery log.

log_sections.applied_detail_desc: Description: Detailed list of all files and folders actually created or modified on disk.
log_sections.unified_tree_desc: Description: The complete design structure combining 'Scaffold Tree' and 'Source Code' editor contents.
log_sections.applied_structure_desc: Description: Pure applied tree containing only items where physical changes occurred (excluding skipped files).
log_sections.gitkeep_structure_desc: Description: Tree structure of '.gitkeep' files created to maintain empty folders.
